1.0.0.title: Welcome to WarnWeather!
1.0.0.body: Thanks for installing. Set your location and forecast options in the watchface settings.

1.1.0.title: Thanks for updating!
1.1.0.body: WarnWeather 1.1.0 brings bug fixes and polish. Adjust your forecast, rain radar, and calendar in the watchface settings.

1.2.0.title: Thanks for updating!
1.2.0.body: WarnWeather 1.2.0 fixes weather updates on Pebble Classic and Steel. Adjust your forecast, rain radar, and calendar in settings.

1.3.0.title: Thanks for updating!
1.3.0.body: WarnWeather 1.3.0 adds the Open-Meteo forecast and a configurable wind-gust line, plus a redesigned settings screen. Adjust your forecast, rain radar, and calendar in settings.

1.3.1.title: Thanks for updating!
1.3.1.body: WarnWeather 1.3.1 polishes the settings screen with a sticky forecast & radar preview and a refined accent palette. Adjust your forecast, rain radar, and calendar in settings.

1.3.2.title: Thanks for updating!
1.3.2.body: WarnWeather 1.3.2 refines the settings screen with updated descriptions and a preview. Adjust your forecast, rain radar, and calendar in settings.

1.4.0.title: Thanks for updating!
1.4.0.body: WarnWeather 1.4.0 adds public-holiday highlighting for many countries and regions, plus a configurable GPS location cache. Adjust your forecast, rain radar, holidays, and calendar in settings.

1.4.1.title: Thanks for updating!
1.4.1.body: WarnWeather 1.4.1 expands public-holiday highlighting to 150+ countries worldwide with refined regional pickers. Adjust your forecast, rain radar, holidays, and calendar in settings.

1.5.0.title: UV index + third graph line
1.5.0.body: Pick what the forecast graph's secondary and new third line show — precip, wind, gust or UV index. The area fill now works for any main metric, each in its own colour. Fixed Roboto and Bitham font scaling on emery

1.5.1.title: Update notifications & settings preview polish
1.5.1.body: Improved visibility of the secondary metric. Added a one-time heads-up when a newer version is available in the appstore. Settings forecast and radar preview improved.

1.5.2.title: Forecast preview alignment
1.5.2.body: Settings forecast preview now matches the watch — lines and dots align with the hour ticks and rain bars.

1.6.0.title: More Layouts & Health view
1.6.0.body: Added Health data — steps, sleep, and heart rate on the status line + beta health graph. New too: warning for incoming rain(needs radar) and a some layout customizations with bigger fonts.

1.6.1.title: Layout fixes
1.6.1.body: Fine tuned layout for non emery platforms.

1.6.2.title: Layout presets and fixes for older watches
1.6.2.body: Updated layout presets. More incoming. Fixed the watchface not starting on Pebble Classic and Steel.

releaseNotification.title: Layout presets and fixes for older watches
releaseNotification.body: Updated layout presets. More incoming. Fixed the watchface not starting on Pebble Classic and Steel.
